name: slider

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## slider
**Type:** registry:ui
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** radix-ui

visual_summary: A slider is a graphical user interface element used to select or display a value by moving a handle along a scale. It is commonly used for adjusting settings such as audio volume, image brightness, or font sizes. Slider components can be used to gather input from users in a more engaging and intuitive way.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: slider
Description: A slider is a graphical user interface element used to select or display a value by moving a handle along a scale. It is commonly used for adjusting settings such as audio volume, image brightness, or font sizes. Slider components can be used to gather input from users in a more engaging and intuitive way.
Style: minimalist, flat
Interactions: draggable, animated
Tags: input fields, user interaction, settings

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
